overall.description: A ship simulator game depicting a first-person view from the bridge of a vessel navigating through stormy coastal waters. The scene features functional navigation displays and radar equipment, with choppy seas and overcast skies throughout the voyage.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

agents.ego_description: operating the ship through choppy seas while monitoring the radar and navigation displays

entered.detail: the forward deck of the vessel with metal railings and red deck markings
metal safety railing on the port side of the bridge
metal safety railing on the starboard side of the bridge
electronic chart display showing coastal map with vessel position
circular radar screen with rotating sweep showing surrounding contacts
blue sensor display showing depth or additional navigation data
choppy dark gray water with visible wave movement

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a steady first-person view from a ship's bridge moving through stormy seas. The bow of the vessel cuts through choppy dark water while navigation monitors and a rotating radar display are visible overhead. The scene is consistently overcast with no other vessels in sight.

scene_state.functional_zone: ship bridge navigating stormy coastal waters

events.description: lightning strikes the water on the starboard side, creating a bright flash that briefly illuminates the ocean surface

agents.ego_description: continuing to navigate the vessel through rough seas, maintaining course after the lightning strike

entered.detail: bright electrical discharge striking the water surface on the starboard side

segments.scene_description: The ship continues moving forward through the stormy waters. At approximately 8 seconds, a lightning bolt strikes the ocean on the right side, creating a dramatic bright flash against the dark gray seascape. The navigation equipment continues to operate normally as the vessel maintains its course through the rough conditions.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a ship's bridge as a steady voyage through stormy seas is interrupted by a sudden atmospheric event. It begins with the vessel cutting through choppy dark water, with the interior bridge equipment and a rotating radar display visible overhead under a heavy overcast sky. As the ship maintains its course through the rough conditions, the dark gray seascape is suddenly illuminated by a dramatic flash of light. This transition occurs as a lightning bolt strikes the ocean to the right, momentarily brightening the gloomy environment before the scene returns to the steady rhythm of the storm.
